The health benefits of Stolzia peperomioides include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and reduce oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Stolzia peperomioides include gentiopicrin, loganin, and amarogentin, which have been reported to possess medicinal properties.
